basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) has released the official Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 Project Associate I vacancy has been announced under the NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a B.E./ B.Tech. or M.E./ M.Tech. degree in Mechanical Engineering, E&I, ECE, or EE can apply through Email on or before 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates will get relaxation as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B. Tech. /M.E. / M. Tech. degree in ME/ E &I /ECE/ EE
qualification.details: B.E./ B. Tech. /M.E. / M. Tech. degree in ME/ E &I /ECE/ EE Experience in experimental thermal measurements, including the use of thermocouples, data acquisition systems, and sensor integration.

salary_details.details: INR 30,000/- month (+10% H. R. A as per the Institute norms.)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate-I position at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Associate-I position at NIT Silchar is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B. Tech. /M.E. / M. Tech. degree in Mechanical Engineering (ME), Electronics & Instrumentation (E&I), Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), or Electrical Engineering (EE).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of INR 30,000/- per month, plus 10% House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per the Institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Associate-I position at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your filled application form along with your CV and self-attested copies of relevant documents to the Principal Investigator (P.I.) via email.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email. You need to send a soft copy of your application and documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Therefore, it is presumed that there is no application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening of applications, followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate-I position is a temporary role, as indicated in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Silchar located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Silchar is located in Silchar, Assam, with the pincode 788010.
